title: The Commander Battles Intensify
description: On pages 14–17, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Unknown person #14, Unknown person #15, Unknown person #16, King as The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.
scene: The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Knock it off with those aimless attacks!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: A pity I didn't slit your throat...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sorry, frankly, I need you to step back!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You should at least use a blade when you go for the kill!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: What you just pulled is unforgivable!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 28 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
